title: High and Low
tmdbOverview: A Yokohama shoe executive faces a wrenching choice when kidnappers mistakenly seize his chauffeur’s son but demand the ransom anyway.
synopsis: High and Low (1963) is a drama, crime and thriller film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.4 on IMDb. A standout of 1960s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 13 certification (AR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
